channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: 40-44 fortune green, 16th April
item.description:
Trench and potholes on both sides of road crating hazards

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 56, Fortune Green Road, West Hampstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish,back of westbere house, 16th April
item.description:
Dumped rubbish ,back of westbere house

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 221, High Street, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Flytip roberts close, 16th April
item.description:
Flytip roberts close, rubbish dumped everywhere,old sofas etc

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Zig zag line by pole2 been patched up borough to repaint lines, 16th April
item.description:
Zig zag line by pole2 been patched up borough to repaint lines
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicle, 16th April
item.description:
Been dumped months and not moved flat tire now and very dusty MOT running out in May. Maybe stolen
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Blackheath Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pedestrian crossing light stuck, 16th April
item.description:
One of the Pedestrian crossing lights is stuck as once the lights go back to red button is pressed with noone around
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Croydon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road surface in poor condition here - please inspect, 16th April
item.description:
A previous report in February here was closed off and not resolved. I was advised to log a new report. Please attend and inspect the road surface here

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmstead Lane, Elmstead, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped car, 16th April
item.description:
Dumped car sorned on a public road no road tax no mot time to remove it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipped, 16th April
item.description:
Dumped mattress

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kent House Lane, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle with expired MOT parked in public space, 16th April
item.description:
YK60NHL BMW series 3 - MOT expired parked for several days outside 184 Upland Road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 184, Upland Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bikes obstruction - Rochester Road, 16th April
item.description:
Lime bikes blocking clearly marked disabled parking bay.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 122, Kentish Town Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned lime scooter outside 49 Rochester Road, 16th April
item.description:
Abandoned lime scooter blocking the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 52, Rochester Road, Kentish Town, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: The car park bay floor mark in double yellow area, 16th April
item.description:
The car park bay floor mark should remove in double yellow line area. The car parking area in there will block junction when the car come from summer road/Lisford street.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Commercial Way, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle abandoned in restricted parking bay, 16th April
item.description:
Vehicle has been present for around 4 weeks. Vehicle is clamped, but unclear who by. Flat tyre, soil gathered around it. Tax until Sept 2026, but MOT expired Sept 2025. Parked in a 30 minute bay, but no enforcement seen on the vehicle.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 118, Anerley Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass everywhere in road, 15th April
item.description:
Shattered broken glass strewn across road after police incident involving two cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Farleigh Avenue, Hayes, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Approx. 10 inch pot hole just before zebra crossing on drivers side area., 15th April
item.description:
Wheel of car hit the pot hole quite badly.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Dunkery Road, Mottingham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Pedestal Fan Dumped on Pavement, 15th April
item.description:
An unwanted pedestal fan has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 69. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Durham Rise, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unwanted Plastic Storage Rack Dumped on Pavement, 15th April
item.description:
An unwanted plastic storage rack has been left dumped on the pavement outside number 106. Can the local team please remove it. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Multiple Bags of Garden Waste Dumped Under Tree, 15th April
item.description:
Multiple bags of garden waste have been left dumped under the tree outside number. Can the local team please clear them away. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Griffin Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish Dumped on Pavement, 15th April
item.description:
Various items of rubbish have been left dumped on the pavement. Can the local team please remove them. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ancona Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet
